metadata.thoughts:
**Determining strike information**

I'm looking at the instructions regarding location codes, specifically the 2-digit ISTAT region codes. There's a regional strike in Campania, "avviso di sciopero di 4 ore," for October 13, 2025. I have to confirm this as a strike announcement and note that it's true. The start and end dates will be formatted as "2025-10-13 08:30:00" and "2025-10-13 12:30:00." The location code for Campania is "15," so the code will be ["15"].
